docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT CARDONA, JOSE D. CABRERA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-10-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
